REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR THIS MOTION STATES THAT THE PERSONAL SERVICE SPECIFIED WAS NEITHER ON THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE DEFENDANT NOR WAS IT TO THE ADDRESS FOR THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE DEFENDANT THE COURT HAS ON FILE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF YUTING WEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT JUN MIN ZHANG'S FURTHER RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. ONE AND REQUEST FOR ORDER AWARDING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT AND DEFENSE COUNSEL IN THE SUM OF $1,060 IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. THE MOTION WAS FILED ON OCTOBER 12, 2022, 15 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE NOVEMBER 2, 2022 HEARING DATE. SEE CCP 1005(B). PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SEND PROPOSED ORDER TRACKING THE ADOPTED RULING OF THE COURT VIA EMAIL TO PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Vacated

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF YUTING WEN's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date (3/24/23) at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising from the acquisition or disposition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. The proof of service on file for this Motion states that the personal service specified was neither on the attorney of record for the Defendant nor was it to the address for the attorney of record for the Defendant the court has on file. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Jun Min Zhang'S Fuurther Responses Without Objections, To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Defense Counsel In The Sum Of $1,060; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances by any party.
Court provided Cantonese Interpreter: Dorothy Wong is excused at 9:15am.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YUTING WEN's Motion To Compel Defendant Jun Min Zhang's Further Responses Without Objections, To Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Defense Counsel In The Sum Of $1,060 is denied as untimely. The Motion was filed on October 12, 2022, 15 court days before the November 2, 2022 hearing date. See CCP 1005(b). Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to
Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
